content.text:
I have enough verified data. Here is the result:

- **`crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/mod.rs`** — only calls `fs::register(registry)`, `git::register(registry)`, etc.; does **not** call `registry.register(…)` directly → excluded
- **`crates/orbit-tools/src/registry.rs`** — defines `ToolRegistry::register`; doesn't call it → excluded  
- **`crates/orbit-agent/src/runtime/backend.rs`** — has `ProviderRegistry::register`, not `ToolRegistry::register` → excluded  
- **`crates/orbit-engine/src/executor/registry.rs`** — has `ActivityExecutorRegistry::register`, not `ToolRegistry::register` → excluded
